summary: Pre-approval AI failure-mode checklist (M1-M7) for research agents. Generic across domains; runs before A1-A5 approval gates, before folding results into durable artifacts, and before handoff.

install.claude_code: Packaged install copies this skill into the target Claude Code skills root. Installed copies do not auto-follow repo updates; reinstall or rerun install with --force to refresh. For live repo-tracking development installs, use packages/skills-market/scripts/install_symlink_claude_code.sh against the monorepo skills root; that helper symlinks all market-listed skill-pack entries into the target Claude Code skills root, not only research-integrity.
install.codex: Packaged install copies this skill into the target Codex skills root. Installed copies do not auto-follow repo updates; reinstall or rerun install with --force to refresh. For live repo-tracking development installs, use packages/skills-market/scripts/install_symlink_codex.sh against the monorepo skills root; that helper symlinks all market-listed skill-pack entries into the target Codex skills root, not only research-integrity.

For live repo-tracking development installs, use packages/skills-market/scripts/install_symlink_opencode.sh against the monorepo skills root; that helper symlinks all market-listed skill-pack entries into the target OpenCode skills root, not only research-integrity.
